text: Seasonal sales data for January: Across all years, January the most sold product was Staple envelope and was overall barely profitable seasonal month with a margin of 9.6% while having one of the weakest performing sales among all seasonal months. The total sales were $94924.84. Additionally the average discount given was 15.0% (47.0% of orders were discounted).
